title: [MTR4] WMATA 7000 Series
body:
The Washington Metro 7000 Series are a Railcar manufactured by Kawasaki for the Washington Metro in 2013, They replaced the 1000, 2000, 4000, and 5000 Series. They are assembled in A-B+B-A+A-B+B-A Formations, and there are currently 748 Units in service as of 2025. They have a top speed of 121 km/h, and Operate on a 4' 8 1⁄4" Guague.

Orignal Model made by ExtremeMakerX, Ported to MTR 4.0.0 by Aecth Thean.
